name: agent-teams-control-plane
description: Optional hosted integration control-plane for Agent Teams.

scripts.build: pnpm db:generate && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/shared build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/platform-config build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/platform-logger build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/platform-crypto build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/platform-database build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/platform-api build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/features-system-health build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/features-external-action-content build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/features-outbox build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/features-workspace-identity build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/features-integration-connections build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/features-github-installation-setup build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/api build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/worker build
scripts.worker:smoke:db: pnpm db:test:prepare && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/platform-database exec tsx src/prisma/smoke-worker-db.ts
scripts.verify:phase1: pnpm format:check && pnpm architecture:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm worker:smoke && pnpm worker:smoke:dist && pnpm api:smoke && pnpm api:smoke:dist && pnpm config:hosted-failfast
